title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Dunzo Logistics

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Dunzo Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dunzo Logistics! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dunzo Logistics:
Dunzo Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
